title: viguiera pusilla
intro: Viguiera pusilla, also known as the Dwarf Bush Sunflower, is a small shrub that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Viguiera pusilla include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including cuts, scrapes, and minor burns.
